Tereza Fialová
Brand & Content Marketing Manager
tereza.fialova@example.cz · +420 730 555 212 · linkedin.com/in/terezafialova-fixture
Životopis — synthetic fixture, not a real person

Pracovní zkušenosti

Brand & Content Marketing Manager — Lipová Roastery, Praha
Březen 2021 – present
Owns the brand voice and editorial calendar for a direct-to-consumer coffee
subscription; grew the email list from 4,000 to 31,000 subscribers and lifted
campaign open rates to 42% through a relaunched onboarding series.
Vede tříčlenný tým copywriterů a designérů a řídí rozpočet na výkonnostní
reklamu napříč Meta a Google kanály.

Content Marketing Specialist — Severka Outdoor, Brno
Květen 2017 – Únor 2021
Planned and produced long-form trip guides and gear reviews that became the
top organic traffic source; coordinated seasonal influencer partnerships and
ran the seasonal photography shoots end to end.

Junior Copywriter — Atelier Modřín, Praha
Září 2014 – Duben 2017
Wrote landing-page and packaging copy for regional food and beverage clients;
maintained the shared tone-of-voice guide for the studio.

Vzdělání

Bc. in Marketing Communications & PR — Univerzita Karlova, Praha
2011 – 2014.

Dovednosti
Brand strategy, editorial planning, SEO copywriting, Meta Ads Manager, Google
Analytics 4, Mailchimp, Canva, influencer outreach, campaign budgeting.

Jazyky
Čeština rodilá, angličtina C1, němčina B1.
